title: ICE40 ABC issue?
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

I'm trying to output VGA signal on TinyFPGA BX (ICE40LP8K).
The signal doesn't work only with default `ABC`, probably due to some timing, even though it worked before.

### Results on master 74e93e083ff23f3381fe2409e5847f9843840b17
synth_ice40  option|Result
------------ | -------------
(Default = ABC) | :x:
`-retime`| :white_check_mark:
`-noabc`| :white_check_mark:
`-flowmap`| :white_check_mark:
`-abc2`| :white_check_mark:
`-abc9`| :white_check_mark:

But if I revert this commit  https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/commit/1679682fa3ae18282b49452891282901a3548ecc like this (identified by git bisect), VGA signal works even with `ABC`.

    diff --git a/passes/opt/opt_reduce.cc b/passes/opt/opt_reduce.cc
    index f640f50a..e591a30e 100644
    --- a/passes/opt/opt_reduce.cc
    +++ b/passes/opt/opt_reduce.cc
    @@ -44,10 +44,9 @@ struct OptReduceWorker
                    cells.erase(cell);

                    RTLIL::SigSpec sig_a = assign_map(cell->getPort(ID::A));
    -               sig_a.sort_and_unify();
                    pool<RTLIL::SigBit> new_sig_a_bits;

    -               for (auto &bit : sig_a)
    +               for (auto &bit : sig_a.to_sigbit_set())
                    {
                            if (bit == RTLIL::State::S0) {
                                    if (cell->type == ID($reduce_and)) {
    @@ -87,7 +86,6 @@ struct OptReduceWorker
                    }

                    RTLIL::SigSpec new_sig_a(new_sig_a_bits);
    -               new_sig_a.sort_and_unify();

                    if (new_sig_a != sig_a || sig_a.size() != cell->getPort(ID::A).size()) {
                            log("    New input vector for %s cell %s: %s\n", cell->type.c_str(), cell->name.c_str(), log_signal(new_sig_a));


### Design
- [top.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/4778615/top.zip)
  - The verilog top.v was generated by https://github.com/phanrahan/magma
  - Just in case, the zip has working output (good.json), and non-working output (bad.json)
  - (Expected result is screen filled with red by VGA output signal)

### Versions
- Yosys 0.9+2406 (git sha1 74e93e08, clang 10.0.0-4ubuntu1 -fPIC -Os)
- nextpnr-ice40 -- Next Generation Place and Route (Version c9e7d14)
- icepack cd2610e0fa1c6a90e8e4e4cfe06db1b474e752bb

### Build
    yosys -q -p 'synth_ice40 -top top -json top.json' top.v
    nextpnr-ice40 --lp8k --package cm81 --json top.json --pcf TinyFPGA-BX.pcf --asc top.asc --opt-timing
    icepack top.asc top.bin
